# Mohamed AI Laboratory — Complete LLM Resource Document

Owner: Mohamed Ahmed Abdelraouf
Role: AI & Embedded Systems Engineer, Computer Science & AI Student
Email: bazeet298@gmail.com
GitHub: https://github.com/moego0
LinkedIn: www.linkedin.com/in/mohamedahmedabdelraouf
Location: Egypt

---

## 1. Biography

Mohamed Ahmed Abdelraouf is an AI Engineer and Embedded Systems Developer currently studying Computer Science & Artificial Intelligence. He operates "Mohamed AI Laboratory", a personal cyber-physical research workspace where he prototypes intelligent systems at the intersection of advanced deep learning and physical hardware. 

His engineering philosophy is built around private, local, and decentralized AI processing (edge computing, TinyML). He specializes in compressing neural networks to run under extreme resource constraints (e.g., microcontrollers with <100KB RAM) and building hardware foundations from scratch—ranging from frame assembly of 3D printers to home copper-plating of dual-layer PCBs.

---

## 2. Technical Specializations & Stack

### Core Domains
- **Artificial Intelligence (AI) & Deep Learning**: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), Audio DSP (MFCCs, spectrogram extraction), Sensor Fusion, Real-time Bio-Signal Classifiers, AI Agents.
- **TinyML & Edge AI**: Network Quantization (INT8 post-training quantization), TensorFlow Lite for Microcontrollers, Edge Impulse pipelines, model optimization.
- **Robotics & Biomedical Engineering**: Electromyography (EMG) muscle signal processing, servo actuators, analog circuit filtering, prosthetic control systems.
- **Hardware Engineering**: KiCad schematic design, high-frequency PCB routing, home chemical electroless copper deposition, FDM 3D printer mechanics and Marlin firmware configurations.

### Programming Languages
- Python, C, C++, TypeScript, JavaScript, Dart (Flutter), SQL, Assembly.

### Frameworks & Libraries
- TensorFlow, TensorFlow Lite, PyTorch, scikit-learn, Librosa, OpenCV, Keras, Node.js, Electron, React, PyQt6.

### Microcontrollers & IoT Protocols
- STM32 (ARM Cortex-M), ESP32, Arduino, Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE), WebSockets, WebSocket Server/Client, I2C, SPI, UART.

---

## 3. Comprehensive Project Portfolios

### 1. Local Tab Agent
- **Description**: A local, private, and repository-aware AI coding assistant extension for VS Code, published on the Open VSX Registry.
- **Core Technology**: TypeScript, Websockets, Ollama, Browser Tab bridging APIs, Local LLMs (Llama 3, Phi-3, Qwen-2).
- **Key Features**:
  - Bridges the editor workspace context with local Ollama models and private browser AI tabs (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini) via WebSocket connections to eliminate API fees.
  - Distributes heavy LLM planning workloads by pooling CPU/GPU computing resources across multiple local client machines in "Swarm Groups."
- **Metrics**: Surpassed 650+ downloads on the Open VSX Registry.

### 2. Custom Wake-Word Engine (TinyML Keyword Spotter)
- **Description**: An end-to-end TinyML audio pipeline for training and deploying customized voice wake-word triggers on low-power edge microcontrollers.
- **Core Technology**: Python, TensorFlow, TensorFlow Lite Micro, Librosa, Python-based audio data augmentation.
- **Key Features**:
  - Trains highly accurate models on very small custom voice datasets using robust data augmentation techniques (additive noise injection, pitch shifting, time-stretching).
  - Extracts 2D Mel-Frequency Cepstral Coefficients (MFCC) feature matrices from raw audio buffers, feeding them into a lightweight CNN classifier.
  - Compresses models via post-training INT8 quantization to run on ESP32/STM32 microcontrollers under a 100KB RAM footprint.
- **Metrics**: Achieves ≈98% classification accuracy.

### 3. EMG Bionic Hand
- **Description**: A muscle-controlled prosthetic robotic hand driven by biological Electromyography (EMG) sensor inputs.
- **Core Technology**: Arduino, EMG Biosensors, Embedded C, multi-servo control, custom CAD.
- **Key Features**:
  - Filters and amplifies low-voltage analog electrical signals from skin electrodes.
  - Extracts biological signal envelopes in real time inside embedded microcontroller loops.
  - Translates signal thresholds into precise, proportional multi-servo actuator positioning to open and close fingers.
- **Exhibitions**: Showcased at the Pharos University engineering exhibition.

### 4. Panic Attack Detection System
- **Description**: A wearable sensor-fusion wristband designed to detect physiological markers of panic attack onset in real time.
- **Core Technology**: Python, scikit-learn, Random Forest, SVM, Arduino, sensor integration.
- **Key Features**:
  - Fuses multi-sensor inputs including Heart Rate (PPG), Electrodermal Activity (EDA), skin temperature, and motion.
  - Features personalized baseline calibration, adjusting model thresholds dynamically to the wearer's resting physiology.
  - Classifies panic onset and alerts the user within ~1 second of physiological threshold breach.

### 5. Self-Built 3D Printer & PCB Fabrication Lab
- **Description**: A home manufacturing and prototyping workstation designed to support all hardware/enclosure fabrication.
- **Core Technology**: Marlin Firmware, KiCad, SolidWorks/CAD, Electroless Copper Plating Chemistry.
- **Key Features**:
  - Assembled an FDM 3D printer from individual frame members, stepper motors, wiring, and Marlin firmware configuration.
  - Built an electroless copper plating setup for home PCB fabrication, enabling double-sided PCBs with through-holes to be plated, etched, and soldered at home.

### 6. Schematic Sidekick
- **Description**: An AI hardware design tool that converts natural language project specifications into functional wiring guides and schematics.
- **Core Technology**: Python, LLMs, Schematic Generation Engine, Firmware synthesis.
- **Key Features**:
  - Recommends optimal microcontroller boards and modules based on project descriptions.
  - Synthesizes wiring lists, generates electrical connections, and produces initial embedded C firmware drafts.

### 7. Interview Booster
- **Description**: Desktop AI copilot application providing real-time voice transcription and conversational support.
- **Core Technology**: TypeScript, Local Whisper STT inference, Node.js.
- **Key Features**: Runs low-latency local speech-to-text models to transcribe audio inputs and formulate answers instantly during interviews.

### 8. AI Desktop Assistant
- **Description**: Bilingual smart home and automation controller.
- **Core Technology**: Python, PyQt6, Gemini API, OpenCV, BLE, STM32.
- **Key Features**: Fuses camera-based computer vision and voice command recognition to manage local applications and smart home devices.

### 9. Micropad (Senet Labs)
- **Description**: Production-ready mechanical macro-keyboard shortcut pad.
- **Core Technology**: C, KiCad, STM32F4, Electron, React, USB HID protocols.
- **Key Features**: Shortcut mappings, media control dials, OTA firmware updates, and React customization app.

## 5. Competitions & Hackathons

- **Pharos University Exhibition**: Presented EMG prosthetic bionic hand, receiving recognition for biomedical and robotic integration.
- **Embedded Robotics Challenges**: Developed custom firmware layouts for autonomous maze-solving and line-tracking robotic platforms.

---

## 6. Publications & Research Interests

- **Private & Local AI Retrievability**: Researching lightweight client-side models, compute-sharing architectures, and vector-data schemas that operate offline.
- **Edge Inference Architectures**: Studying fixed-point arithmetic optimization for convolutional layers on ultra-low-power microcontrollers.
